articles.title: Decades-old weeping willow collapses in Boston Public Garden
articles.description:
The tree was estimated to be 68 years old.

The post Decades-old weeping willow collapses in Boston Public Garden appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Weeping willow tree collapses in Boston Public Garden on July 16, 2026.
The tree was estimated to be 68 years old.
Residents may face temporary park closures for tree removal and safety assessments.
